reviews.author: Esther W.
reviews.text: Technician Jay was prompt, professional, and diagnosed the issue quickly. Fair pricing and clean work.

reviews.author: Albert O.
reviews.text: Rooter Pro came out same day for a clogged main line. Jeremy worked until the job was done and explained everything.

reviews.author: Terri L.
reviews.text: Called for a water heater issue. Megan's team was responsive, honest about options, and did not try to upsell.

reviews.author: Marva S.
reviews.text: Excellent plumbing company. On time, fair pricing, and Brandon cleaned up after the work was done.

reviews.author: Ludmila R.
reviews.text: Rooter Pro Plumbing provided outstanding service. I called them because of a leak and they responded quickly.

reviews.author: Teriece W.
reviews.text: Great experience with Rooter Pro. Professional, knowledgeable, and fairly priced. Would use again.

reviews.author: Angi Customer
reviews.text: Showed up on time, diagnosed the problem, and fixed it same day. Fair pricing and quality work.

reviews.author: Angi Customer
reviews.text: Rooter Pro went above and beyond. Their technician was courteous and thorough. Highly recommend.

counts.aggregate_rating_source: Google (reported via aggregators) / BBB A+ / TrustDALE certified

notes: Strong trust signals. 127 reviews at 5.0 stars. BBB A+ (accredited 2024). TrustDALE Certified with $10K Make It Right guarantee. Fox 5 Atlanta partner. Technician names recur across reviews: Jay, Jeremy, Brandon. Female-owned (Megan Dammann as sole principal).
phone_conflict_flag: Queue phone: (470) 747-6882. Website: (770) 299-2627. BBB: (470) 600-5146. Built site with queue phone; confirm canonical with Megan.
